release_review.summary: Upgrades the Env App terminal dependency to the released floeterm WebGL renderer path and keeps the Runtime Service protocol window unchanged.
release_review.same_window_rationale: The v0.5.10 release changes only the packaged Env App terminal frontend: it consumes the published floeterm WebGL renderer, adds Vite WASM handling, and selects the WebGL renderer in TerminalPanel. No Runtime Service request, response, startup report, session, or attach protocol fields changed, so v0.5.8 remains the minimum compatible Desktop and Runtime window.
checked_surfaces: Env App TerminalPanel attach and resize lifecycle
floeterm published npm dependency and lockfile policy
Env App WASM production build with Beamterm assets
Workbench terminal visual coordinator no-suspend contract
desktop bundled runtime startup with local UI terminal sessions
